question: What is ghost-layer-pp-cli?
answer: ghost-layer-pp-cli is a Go CLI generated by CLI Printing Press for the Ghost Layer dual-chain XRPL/Base toll gateway. It provides commands for health checks, browsing the x402 product catalog, generating payment quotes, dispensing products after XRPL payment, executing cross-chain bridge settlements, viewing agent stats and loyalty tiers, and inspecting the 54-block Cube execution matrix.

question: What is Ghost Layer?
answer: Ghost Layer is the proprietary dual-chain XRPL/Base toll gateway at ghost-layer.onrender.com. Three products run on it: Agent Kiosk (AI agent vending machine with X-Grace-Tip auction), TipMaster (Farcaster RLUSD tip bot), and Signal Auction Loom (real-time WebGL market signal auction visualizer). Products are licensed through Ghost Layer's X402-BEAST-KEY URIToken system.

question: How do I buy a product through Ghost Layer?
answer: Recommended flow: (1) ghost-layer status (confirm live); (2) ghost-layer x402 catalog (see available products); (3) ghost-layer x402 quote --product routing.telemetry --wallet rXXX (returns pay_to address + memo_hex + RLUSD amount); (4) send RLUSD on XRPL to the pay_to address with memo_hex as MemoData; (5) ghost-layer x402 dispense routing.telemetry (after payment confirmed); (6) ghost-layer agent rXXX (check loyalty tier earned).

question: What environment variables does ghost-layer-pp-cli use?
answer: Two environment variables: GHOST_LAYER_WALLET — your XRPL wallet address (rXXX...), sent as the X-Agent-Wallet header for all requests; GHOST_LAYER_BASE_URL — override the API base URL (default: https://ghost-layer.onrender.com). Both are optional for read commands but GHOST_LAYER_WALLET is needed to track your agent loyalty tier.

question: What does ghost-layer cube state show?
answer: The cube state command returns a snapshot of the 54-block Cube execution matrix — Ghost Layer's internal state representation of recent cross-chain settlements and routing decisions across the last 54 blocks. Useful for debugging bridge execution or auditing recent activity.

question: Who built ghost-layer-pp-cli?
answer: ghost-layer-pp-cli was generated by CLI Printing Press (mvanhorn/cli-printing-press) for the Ghost Layer API built by ScriptMasterLabs (Script Master Labs LLC), an SDVOSB. It is MIT licensed.
